title: Accuracy Drill — Mixed Symbols
description: Punishingly mixed punctuation and symbols. Accuracy gate is high — slow down to clear it.

drills.content: const arr = [1, 2, 3]; const obj = { a: 1, b: 2 }; arr.map(x => x * 2);
He whispered, "yes — but only if it costs less than $50." (She didn't reply.)
